sections.name: Officium
lines: Feria Quinta infra Hebdomadam II post Octavam Paschæ

sections.name: Ant 2
lines: Art thou only a stranger to Jerusalem * and hast not heard about Jesus, how they gave him to condemnation to death? Alleluia.

sections.name: Ant 3
lines: And other sheep I have, * that are not of this fold: them also I must bring, and they shall hear my voice, and there shall be one fold and one shepherd, alleluia.
